missing.reason: Apple HIG evidence is required before accessibility can pass.
Provider, relay, network, STT, TTS, or LLM behavior needs replay provenance or live-only rationale.
Attempt commands or manual/tool notes are required for reproducibility.
Failures and state transitions need diagnostic context.
Catalog performance requirement is unmeasured: no stale mutation.
Every meaningful user-visible step needs a screenshot.
Accessibility labels, hierarchy, and Dynamic Type behavior need UI-tree evidence.

product_context.job_to_be_done: Complete AG-011 with confidence: stale reply is ignored or marked canceled consistently.
product_context.persona: A power listener using transcripts, highlights, and AI help without losing trust in sources.
platform_expectations: iPhone-first flow uses system navigation/chrome, safe areas, SF typography, semantic color, 44 pt tap targets, and reachable primary controls.
Accessibility evidence covers VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, motion/transparency settings, and touch target behavior before UI scores can pass.
Provider, relay, transcript, audio, or LLM dependencies are deterministic through fixtures/cassettes or explicitly marked live-only.
State, navigation, queue, playback, and generated report pages are checked across device, viewport, and resume contexts.
product_context.user_value: The flow should make agent chat and tools feel reliable, understandable, and native to Pod0 rather than a test-only path.

template_impact: iOS Glass UI Designer drives restrained material judgment: native chrome first, glass only for hierarchy/context, semantic foreground styles, safe areas, and accessibility fallbacks.
Mobile UX Design drives user-goal framing, thumb-zone reachability, touch-target sizing, interruption/resume checks, navigation convention review, and performance-as-UX budgets.
The Liquid Glass reference from Mobile UX Design adds explicit contrast, Reduce Transparency, Increase Contrast, Dynamic Type, and oldest-device performance checks.
The generated page front-loads launch readiness, risk class, evidence quality, accessibility status, regression coverage, and dependency posture before detailed scores.
The report separates individual dimensions from whole-product cluster judgment so an isolated pass cannot hide a weak or inconsistent product flow.

run.live_dependency_rationale: No live run has been performed; dependencies are blocked until cassette or live-run evidence is attached.

then: stale reply is ignored or marked canceled consistently

scenario.title: Stale reply is ignored or marked canceled consistently

accessibility_dynamic_type.summary: Not assessed. Requires VoiceOver/UI tree labels, Dynamic Type, contrast, Reduce Motion/Transparency, and touch target evidence.

notes: Attach step-by-step observed behavior before changing this verdict.
actual_result.summary: No run evidence has been attached yet; this generated page is intentionally incomplete.

analytics_privacy_boundaries.summary: Not assessed. Confirm useful event boundaries without PII, private keys, raw transcripts/audio, or provider secrets.

artifacts.summary: Required visual/raw evidence from the catalog: cancel and final state. Only the source catalog and rubric metadata exist right now.

attempted_test.summary: No run evidence has been attached yet; this generated page is intentionally incomplete. A simulator, manual, or automation run must execute scenario AG-011.

before_after_deltas.summary: Not assessed. Capture the before state, user action, after state, expected delta, unexpected regression, and screenshot pair for every visible product change.

content_hierarchy.summary: Not assessed. Verify podcast/show/episode/transcript/agent content outranks chrome and does not truncate critical meaning.

controls_gestures_audio.summary: Not assessed. Review must check buttons, menus, sheets, gestures, audio route controls, haptics, keyboard alternatives, and one-handed reach.

cross_screen_continuity.summary: Not assessed. Capture before/after navigation state for adjacent surfaces and ensure mini-player, queue, transcript, agent, and settings remain coherent.

data_integrity_state_sync.summary: Not assessed. Verify persisted state, Rust projections, Swift render state, queue/download/transcript/index data, and exported/imported records agree before and after the user-visible action.

defects_issues_filed.summary: No defects have been observed yet because the scenario has not run. Any actionable defect found later must link a GitHub issue before the page can leave incomplete.

device_os_matrix.summary: No device/OS matrix has run. The first validation should record simulator/device, OS, locale, appearance, Dynamic Type, and network state.

device_viewport_coverage.summary: Not assessed. Record iPhone size class, Dynamic Type, orientation when relevant, and generated GitHub Pages desktop/mobile viewport checks for the published report page.

error_recovery_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Error, offline, retry, cancellation, and recovery paths must be captured where the scenario can fail.

evidence_confidence.summary: Evidence confidence is zero until a current build, device/OS, rerun count, freshness, and flake notes are attached.

evidence_provenance.summary: Not assessed. Every artifact must identify its source command/tool, capture context, source commit, branch, device/OS, SHA/path, redaction state, freshness, and whether it is live, replayed, generated, or copied from prior evidence.

execution_attempts.summary: No attempts, retries, or branch executions have run. The page reserves structured attempt records for manual, simulator, CI, and replay executions.

expected_behavior.summary: Expected behavior from BDD: stale reply is ignored or marked canceled consistently. NMP/RMP boundary declared by the catalog: D4,D8,D9.

flow.summary: Catalog flow for Agent Chat And Tools: Given cancel is tapped mid-run, when provider later replies, then stale reply is ignored or marked canceled consistently.

information_architecture.summary: Not assessed. Confirm the user knows location, current mode, and next action from titles, tabs, bars, breadcrumbs, and hierarchy.

instrumentation_gaps.summary: Screenshots, UI trees, logs, metrics, cassettes, and accessibility audits are listed as explicit missing evidence so gaps cannot be hidden in prose.

liquid_glass_ios_primitives.summary: Not assessed. Requires evidence that iOS primitives and glass-like materials are used as functional chrome, with accessibility fallbacks.

localization_content_quality.summary: Not assessed. Review must check locale-sensitive strings, podcast metadata, transcript/agent content, truncation, empty/error copy, and translation safety.

media_session_background_continuity.summary: Not assessed. For podcast-facing flows, verify audio session route, mini-player/full-player continuity, queue state, lock-screen/background behavior, interruptions, and remote commands or mark them N/A with rationale.

motion_haptics.summary: Not assessed. Record transition, haptic, and Reduce Motion behavior when motion is part of the flow.

navigation_state_restoration.summary: Not assessed. Capture tab, sheet, detail path, back stack, deep-link, and relaunch restoration state so navigation success cannot hide stale or contradictory product state.

next_actions.summary: Run the scenario, attach evidence, score every dimension, file defects, and republish this page from validated JSON.

nmp_architecture_cohesiveness.summary: Not assessed. Declared NMP/RMP boundary: D4,D8,D9. Review must check Rust-owned state/policy, thin native renderers, bounded FFI, replay clocks, and privacy fail-closed behavior.

observability.summary: Not assessed. Attach structured logs, metric IDs, provider/request IDs, relay IDs, and redacted traces needed to diagnose failures.

offline_resume_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Offline, interruption, relaunch, background playback, cancellation, retry, and resume behavior must be captured where applicable.

owner_status.summary: Default ownership is validation-agent for evidence and review-agent for scoring/defects until a human or agent owner is assigned. Every blocker, gate, action, defect, and revalidation item must carry owner and status.

performance_metrics.summary: Not measured. Required performance evidence: no stale mutation.

persona_job_acceptance.summary: Persona: A power listener using transcripts, highlights, and AI help without losing trust in sources. Acceptance criteria are the scenario Given/When/Then plus the declared architecture boundary D4,D8,D9.

privacy_security.summary: Not assessed. Validation must scan screenshots, logs, cassettes, relays, and exports for leaked keys, tokens, private audio, or private Nostr material.

product_cluster_coherence.summary: Not assessed. Related scenarios must be judged as a group so UI/UX/product coherence does not pass in isolation while the cluster remains inconsistent.

product_coherence_in_context.summary: Not assessed. The page must explain how this flow fits nearby Pod0 surfaces such as library, player, transcript, agent, settings, and Nostr/social state.

readiness_gates.summary: All readiness gates are blocked until evidence, skill-grounded scoring, product-cluster coherence, defect tracking, and release readiness are populated.

regression_risk.summary: Not assessed. Validation must list adjacent scenarios and modules to rerun after any fix.

reliability_flakiness.summary: Not assessed. Validation must record rerun count, retry causes, flake history, stale-build risk, timeout behavior, and deterministic replay coverage.

replayability_cassette_provenance.summary: Not assessed. Declared dependencies: delayed cassette. Provider, relay, STT, TTS, LLM, and network behavior must use replay cassettes or explain live-only evidence.

revalidation_status.summary: No fix or revalidation cycle exists yet. Every fixed defect must link the fix PR, revalidation run ID, rerun commit, affected dimensions, and remaining open gaps.

review_skill_grounding.summary: Review must be grounded in loaded skills, not generic taste. Selected grounding covers iOS-native glass/material restraint, mobile task flow, touch ergonomics, accessibility settings, and performance-as-UX review.

risks_follow_up.summary: Current risks are scaffolded from missing evidence and cluster regression exposure. Actionable defects must gain issue/PR links and revalidation run IDs.

scenario_setup.summary: Declared setup dependencies: delayed cassette. Provider mode is blocked until validation attaches fixtures or cassettes.

sister_app_nmp_chirp_comparison.summary: Not assessed. Review must compare applicable NMP doctrine and known Chirp/sister-app fixes before marking this flow cohesive.

states_resilience.summary: Not assessed. Capture empty, loading, denied, unavailable, offline, retry, and recovery states reached by this scenario.

touch_ergonomics.summary: Not assessed. Audit primary controls for reachability, 44x44 pt targets, spacing, and gesture alternatives.

ui_polish_report.summary: Not assessed. Requires annotated screenshots for layout, spacing, typography, color, symbols, component state, and platform-native finish.

ux_polish_report.summary: Not assessed. Requires notes on task clarity, user effort, feedback, interruption/resume, recovery, and cognitive load.

verdict.summary: Overall verdict is incomplete because required screenshots, metrics, cassettes, accessibility evidence, critique, and issue back-links are missing.

verdict.score_gate_explanation: Every dimension is scored 0, so the mechanical verdict is incomplete.
verdict.summary: Generated catalog scaffold only. Required execution evidence and critique are missing.
